analysis.analysis_was_performed_on: Madonna dei Fusi (Madonna of the Yarnwinder); Still life (Anonymous, 20th c.)

object_area_sample.object_area_sample_label: Madonna dei Fusi (Madonna of the Yarnwinder)

analysis.analysis_title: Convolutional neural network exploiting pixel surroundings to reveal hidden features in artwork NIR reflectograms
analysis.notes: A computational analysis method based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to estimate the transfer function from visible spectra (VIS) to Near-Infrared (NIR), removing the visible contribution from NIR reflectograms to enhance hidden features. This analysis processes pre-existing datasets acquired by a CNR-INO scanner.

place.place_name: Institute of Information Theory and Automation, Pod Vodárenskou věž 4, Praha, 18000, Czech Republic
National Institute of Optics (INO-CNR), Largo Enrico Fermi 6, 50125 Firenze, Italy

agent.n: Institute of Information Theory and Automation, Academy of Sciences of the Czech Republic
National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

agent.institution: Institute of Information Theory and Automation, Academy of Sciences of the Czech Republic
Institute of Information Theory and Automation, Academy of Sciences of the Czech Republic
National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

method.method_notes: A method based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to estimate the transfer function from visible spectra (VIS) to Near-Infrared (NIR), removing the visible contribution from NIR reflectograms to enhance hidden features.

current_owner.n: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

component.current_owner: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)
National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

software.software_name: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) Model (Karella et al. 2022)
software.software_notes: Custom CNN model designed to estimate NIR response from VIS spectra pixel surroundings. Architecture: 4 CNN layers, 25 filters each, 3x3 kernel size, sigmoid activation.

setting_values.setting_value: Input data: 16 VIS bands, 1 NIR band (1730nm for Still Life, 950nm for Madonna)
Training samples per artwork: 2500 randomly chosen pixels
CNN Architecture: 4 layers, 25 filters/layer, 3x3 kernel, sigmoid activation

dataset.dataset_title: Convolutional neural network exploiting pixel surroundings to reveal hidden features in artwork NIR reflectograms
